title: Harness Parity Epic Implementation Plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for shared skills layer and per-harness shims across Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode.
notes: Implementation plan document (task list/checkboxes, file structure, task ordering) rather than prose guide; does not fit ADR/PRD/SPEC hallmarks so classified as DOC, but is more procedural than typical DOC context material.
